must_detect.matched_text:
Roles: Talaora Industries, Inc. acts as Personal Information Controller; approved processors include Sinta Payroll Services, Inc. (PH) and Nimbus HR Cloud Pte. Ltd. (SG) under an executed DPA.
PII definition: personal data from which identity is apparent or can be reasonably ascertained with other data, consistent with the Data Privacy Act and NPC issuances.
Collection/minimisation: onboarding forms collect only job-related fields (e.g., full name, company ID, bank account alias, TIN label, SSS label); optional fields are disabled in the HR portal.
Retention: payroll and tax records retained for up to ten (10) years to meet BIR/DOLE requirements; recruitment files retained for two (2) years; a retention matrix is maintained in the PIC’s records management policy.
Cross-border transfers: a Transfer Impact Assessment and contractual safeguards (NPC-compliant DSA) were completed for Nimbus HR Cloud; approval for export is on file, but no cross-border data flow is currently active and all HR files remain hosted in PH.
DSAR record: On 2026-05-15, one data subject access request for “Payroll Payslips FY2024” (Employee ID E-000412) was verified and fulfilled; the accompanying erasure request was lawfully deferred due to statutory retention and a response letter was issued.
Consent handling: marketing consent withdrawal is available via the self-service portal; there are no pending consent withdrawals for HR datasets as of this memo.
Erasure controls: deletion is event-based upon lapse of retention; the last quarterly review closed with no exceptions, and “purge” references in system logs are routine and not indicative of incidents.
Banking/capital-markets: shareholder registry data under the Securities Regulation Code is processed by Baryo Transfer & Agency, Inc.; entries used for SEC Form 17-C/17-A reporting exclude account numbers and are aggregated.
Insider governance: the “insider list” referenced in internal policy is template-only and does not enumerate any project or transaction; no trading blackout is declared or impli
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
